patch.value: SDK lacks assertRegisteredCommandOverride testing helper (coverage gap in testing.ts)

src/sdk/testing.ts exports assertRegisteredCommandContract (for registerCommand definitions), assertRegisteredHook, assertRegisteredSearchProvider, assertRegisteredVectorStoreAdapter, assertRegisteredImporter, assertRegisteredExporter, assertRegisteredItemField, assertRegisteredItemType, assertPackageManifest. It does NOT export assertRegisteredCommandOverride, assertRegisteredParserOverride, assertRegisteredPreflightOverride, or assertRegisteredRendererOverride. Extensions using registerCommand(command, override), registerParser, registerPreflight, or registerRenderer have no SDK assertion helper to verify their override registered correctly. This forces package authors to directly inspect the ExtensionCommandRegistry internals.

- SDK testing.ts adds assertRegisteredCommandOverride (+ parser/preflight/renderer parity helpers in scope)
- Helper covered by unit tests at 100%
- docs/SDK.md testing section documents the helper

value.author: sdk-testing-helpers-agent
value.text: Plan: Add 4 override-assertion helpers to src/sdk/testing.ts mirroring assertRegisteredSearchProvider/assertRegisteredHook style: assertRegisteredCommandOverride (commands.overrides by normalizeSdkCommandName), assertRegisteredParserOverride (parsers.overrides), assertRegisteredPreflightOverride (preflight.overrides, GLOBAL - no command field, only extensionName), assertRegisteredRendererOverride (renderers.overrides by format toon/json). Each gets its own ...Expectation interface; reuse normalizeSdkCommandName/normalizeSdkIdentifier/extensionNameSuffix/formatAvailable/sortedUnique; not-found + empty-string guards throw helpful Errors. Import registry+RegisteredExtension*Override types + OutputRendererFormat from loader.js. Tests added to tests/unit/sdk-index.spec.ts via activateExtensionForTest (capabilities commands/parser/preflight/renderers) covering success, not-found, extensionName-scoped, and empty-string guard paths to keep testing.ts at 100% cov. Will NOT touch src/sdk/index.ts (lead wires barrel). Will NOT close item.

value.author: sdk-testing-helpers-agent
value.text:
DONE (not closing - lead integrates). Changed 2 files only.

src/sdk/testing.ts: added 4 named-export helpers mirroring assertRegisteredSearchProvider/assertRegisteredHook style + 4 ...Expectation interfaces. Imported ExtensionCommandRegistry/ExtensionParserRegistry/ExtensionPreflightRegistry/ExtensionRendererRegistry, RegisteredExtensionCommandOverride/ParserOverride/PreflightOverride/RendererOverride, and OutputRendererFormat from ../core/extensions/loader.js. Helpers search result.commands.overrides / result.parsers.overrides / result.preflight.overrides / result.renderers.overrides; reuse normalizeSdkCommandName/normalizeSdkIdentifier/extensionNameSuffix/formatAvailable/sortedUnique; throw helpful not-found + non-empty-string-guard Errors.

tests/unit/sdk-index.spec.ts: added 8 it() tests inside the 'sdk testing helpers' describe via a shared activateOverrideExtensionForTest(name) helper using activateExtensionForTest with capabilities [commands,parser,preflight,renderers] (registerCommand override, registerParser, registerPreflight, registerRenderer('toon')). Covers success, not-found, extensionName-scoped, and empty-string guard paths for each helper. Imported the 4 helpers from ../../src/sdk/testing.js and ExtensionActivationResult/OutputRendererFormat types from loader.js. Did NOT touch src/sdk/index.ts barrel.

Results: slice 43/43 passing; src/sdk/testing.ts at 100% coverage (0 uncovered statements/branches/functions per JSON report); full tsc --noEmit clean.

LEAD: re-export these 5 named symbols from src/sdk/index.ts: assertRegisteredCommandOverride, assertRegisteredParserOverride, assertRegisteredPreflightOverride, assertRegisteredRendererOverride, plus the 4 interfaces RegisteredCommandOverrideExpectation/RegisteredParserOverrideExpectation/RegisteredPreflightOverrideExpectation/RegisteredRendererOverrideExpectation.

patch.value: SDK testing.ts gained assertRegisteredCommandOverride/ParserOverride/PreflightOverride/RendererOverride helpers (+ expectation types), re-exported from the sdk barrel, 100% covered in sdk-index.spec.ts, documented in SDK.md.
